summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pre-sales Board redesign. All features working: 4 metric cards, search bar, date filter, stage tabs, Kanban/List toggle, Add New Lead modal, Lead Detail Modal with 4 tabs (Overview, Remarks, Follow-up, Activity), Move to Stage buttons, Edit mode. Backend APIs for remarks, follow-ups, activity, and move-stage all functional.

issues: FIXED: Typo 'Pre - sale s Board' corrected to 'Pre-sales Board' in CRMPage.jsx line 224

critical_code_review_comments: PreSalesBoard.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Backend v3 endpoints for remarks, follow-ups, activity, and move-stage are correctly implemented
LeadDetailModal component has proper tab navigation and form handling
All CRUD operations work correctly with proper error handling and toast notifications
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* leads, remarks, and follow-ups during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-sales Board fully tested on https://lead-manager-100.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: presales@fitsiomax.com / presales123 (demo dropdown index 3). Features verified: 4 metric cards (Total Leads, New Lead, Pre-sales Qualified, Assigned to Branch), search bar filters by name/email/phone, date filter toggle, stage tabs with counts, Kanban view with 3 columns, List view with table, Add New Lead modal with form fields (name, phone, email, vertical, source, notes), Lead Detail Modal with 4 tabs (Overview, Remarks, Follow-up, Activity), Move to Stage buttons for all 6 stages, Edit mode for lead details. Backend APIs: POST/GET /api/v3/leads/{id}/remarks, POST/GET /api/v3/leads/{id}/follow-ups, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/follow-ups/{fid}/complete, GET /api/v3/leads/{id}/activity, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/move-stage all working correctly.

features_tested.login: Pre-sales user login via demo dropdown (index 3) works correctly
features_tested.metric_cards: 4 metric cards displayed: Total Leads, New Lead, Pre-sales Qualified, Assigned to Branch
features_tested.search_bar: Search filters leads by name, email, phone
features_tested.stage_tabs: Stage tabs filter leads by pipeline stage with counts
features_tested.kanban_view: 3 columns: New Lead, Pre-sales Qualified, Assigned to Branch with lead cards
features_tested.list_view: Table with Lead, Phone, Source, Stage, Date columns
features_tested.add_new_lead: Modal with form (name, phone, email, vertical, source, notes), submit creates lead
features_tested.lead_detail_modal: Opens on card/row click, shows lead name, avatar, source tag, stage badge, Edit/Close buttons
features_tested.overview_tab: Contact Information (phone, email), Lead Summary section, Move to Stage buttons
features_tested.activity_tab: Shows activity log after stage changes
features_tested.edit_mode: Edit name, phone, email, notes and save
features_tested.move_stage: Clicking stage button moves the lead and creates activity log

backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/move-stage: Works - moves lead and creates activity log

mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are live
